projectDescription: A spec-first control protocol for AI chat that routes responses through three explicit depth modes (LOW, MID, DEEP) using structural input analysis, consent-gated reasoning escalation, and bounded audit output.
keyFeatures: Three explicit response depth modes: LOW (minimal), MID (structured), DEEP (full decision support)
Structural input routing — routes by message shape (options, steps, criteria, numbers), not keywords
Consent-gated DEEP entry via POSSIBLE DEEP -> Switch to DEEP? (yes/no) flow
Bounded AUDIT footer (ACTION / RISK / BASIS) appended only when warranted
Fail-closed invariants: outputs ADAM_UNSUPPORTED rather than approximating broken behavior
Transport/activity state machine: TRANSPORT -> ACTIVE -> OFF with exact command matching
Recovery via ADAM REMOUNT capsule replay from any state
Bootstrap classification (TEXT_ONLY, BOUND_RO, BOUND_RW, GHOST) from physical source verification
No-inertia rule: mode is recomputed every turn with no carry-over
Sparse Local Provenance signals (infer / depends:) on eligible DEEP blocks
publicApiSurface: ADAM PING — activate protocol or check liveness
ADAM REMOUNT — emit recovery capsule; exact replay re-enters ACTIVE
ADAM PERSIST — deploy and verify a physical copy of the protocol source
LOW <message> — manual override: force LOW mode
MID <message> — manual override: force MID mode
DEEP <message> — manual override: force DEEP mode
ADAM SELF TEST — run external self-test probe
SYS STATUS — run operational health probe
TRACE INPUT — strict forensic input trace
UNSUPPORTED WHY — diagnostic probe after ADAM_UNSUPPORTED
